caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap is positioned in the lower-left corner of a screen recording. The video displays a Google Sheets spreadsheet containing a list of names and sports teams, such as "DAVID CHUNG" and "LOS ANGELES DODGERS." The screen is branded with "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" logos and the text "JASPYSBREAKS" repeated on the right side. A red YouTube subscribe button is visible at the bottom, accompanied by the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" As the video progresses, the individual in the video adjusts their position and moves their head slightly. The spreadsheet remains the primary focus of the screen, with the cursor highlighting different rows of data as the person interacts with the document. The top browser bar indicates the file is titled "Fr. 06.26.20 10Bx (v2) RT #11 2020 Topps Clearly Authentic Baseball C...".
